nasb.text: For He stands at the right hand of the needy, To save him from those who judge his soul.

esv.text: For he stands at the right hand of the needy one, to save him from those who condemn his soul to death.

cnv.text: 因為他必站在貧窮人的右邊， 拯救他脫離定他死罪的人。

ccb.text: 因为祂保护贫穷的人， 拯救他们脱离置他们于死地的人。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华站在贫穷人的右边， 要拯救他脱离那些定他死罪的人。
